_meta.description: Per-company reported financials behind the Valuation tab's multiples — full-year GWP, PAT (IFRS), YoY growth, net margin and retail-health share — by fiscal year, for the LISTED health insurers. The Valuation tab reads the latest fiscal year per company and derives P/GWP and P/E live (market cap from the daily price feed ÷ these reported figures). Seed = the audited figures hand-checked 2026-06-01; the quarterly agent refreshes them as each result publishes. Missing stays null, never fabricated.
_meta.refresh_cadence: quarterly — Indian listed insurers report within ~45 days of each quarter-end (Q1 ~Aug, Q2 ~Nov, Q3 ~Feb, Q4 + full-year audited ~May). The agent pulls each company's latest reported FULL-YEAR figures every quarter; the full-year basis advances once a year (with Q4).
_meta.metric_basis: Full-year (annual) figures, Rs crore. PAT on the IFRS / Ind AS basis to match the listed reporting. GWP = gross written premium (a premium metric, not profit).
_meta.notes: Listed health insurers only (Niva Bupa, Star Health). Unlisted SAHIs have no market price, so no multiple is published for them (the Valuation tab marks them 'pending'). net_margin = PAT / GWP.

provenance.source_name: Niva Bupa audited FY26 results (year ended 31-Mar-2026), published 8-May-2026: GWP Rs 9,432.9 cr (+27.4%), PAT Rs 366.1 cr (+80%, IFRS), retail-health share 10.1% (+76 bps)
Niva Bupa FY25 audited results: GWP Rs 7,015 cr, PAT Rs 203 cr
Star Health audited FY26 results: GWP Rs 20,369 cr (+16%), PAT Rs 911 cr
